home.tagline: Fast community fuel updates built for quick map scanning.

badges.tapMarkers: Tap markers to confirm or update

mapLegend.title: Map Guide
mapLegend.subtitle: Station status markers.
mapLegend.note: Yellow markers require 3 separate user confirmations to turn Green.

welcomeModal.headline: How the map works
welcomeModal.description: Marker color is the fastest way to scan the map. Open any station popup for queue details, trust status, explicit per-fuel availability, directions, or a fresh update form.

reportedUnavailable.label: Reported Unavailable
reportedUnavailable.desc: Latest report says the station is out of stock.

awaitingReview.label: Awaiting Review
awaitingReview.desc: Reported by the community and still waiting for more confirmations.

verified.label: Verified
verified.desc: Fresh report with 3 confirmations behind it.

stale.label: Stale Report
stale.desc: Older information that may no longer be reliable.

welcomeModal.trustDescription: Yellow markers turn green after 3 separate users tap Confirm. If the station changes, use Update to send a fresh report with queue and fuel details.

nearestSheds.noFuel: Select the fuel type you need above.
nearestSheds.locationNotAvailable: Location not available. Please allow location access.

about.title: A fuel utility built for quick, reliable decisions.
about.text: FullTank is a lightweight mobile-first map for checking fuel availability, queue estimates, and crowdsourced verification. The interface is designed to stay fast and readable on low-end devices while keeping community updates easy to submit.
about.rolloutText: Data is currently strongest around the Western Province while the community grows. Reports from other districts still help improve coverage.
about.verificationText: Stations turn green after 3 separate confirms.
about.staleReportsText: Gray markers indicate older community data.
about.whyItMattersText: A single update is helpful but not always enough. Community confirmations make the signal more reliable before the marker turns green.
about.howToHelpText: Tap Confirm when the information is correct. Use Update Station Data when availability or queue conditions change.
about.detailsText: Include station name, area, Google Maps links, queue estimate, or the exact issue you noticed.
about.whatNextText: Reports go directly to the developer and are used to improve coverage, clean up map data, and fix product issues.
about.detailsPlaceholder: Share the station name, exact issue, Google Maps link, or any details that help verify the report.
about.thankYou: Thank you. Your report has been sent to the developer.
about.bestForMissingText: Include the station name and a Google Maps link if possible.
about.bestForBugsText: Mention the page, the action you tried, and what happened instead.
about.madeForText: FullTank aims to improve first-glance clarity without adding heavy visuals or slow interactions.
about.openSource: FullTank is an open-source initiative built and maintained by the community.
about.joinTeam: Want to join the team? Get in touch
